---
title: "orbital + Snowflake: before & after"
format:
  revealjs:
    include-after-body:
      # both modules first (they define ORB.initRoundtrip / ORB.initInplace and,
      # because ORB_COMBINED is set, do NOT self-init), then the wiring that binds
      # each to its own slide/stage.
      - js/orbital-roundtrip.html
      - js/orbital-inplace.html
      - js/orbital-combined-init.html
---

```{=html}
<!-- Combined "before -> after" deck: round-trip slide, then the orbital way, in
     one flow. ORB_COMBINED tells the two modules not to self-init; the wiring in
     js/orbital-combined-init.html runs them on their own stages. Knobs are shared
     by both halves (R, horizontal, non-Posit). -->
<script>
  window.ORB_COMBINED    = true;
  window.ORB_MODEL_LABEL = 'workflow()';   // R: workflow()  |  Python: Pipeline
  window.ORB_SNOWFLAKE   = '#29B5E8';       // Snowflake brand blue
  window.ORB_RSESSION    = '#276DC3';       // R blue
</script>
```

## The "before": round-trip {.orb-slide .orb-slide-rt}

::: {.orb-stage-wrap}
<div id="orb-stage-rt"></div>
:::

[]{.fragment .orb-frag id="orb-rt-out"}
[]{.fragment .orb-frag id="orb-rt-back"}
[]{.fragment .orb-frag id="orb-rt-newscroll"}
[]{.fragment .orb-frag id="orb-rt-new-out"}
[]{.fragment .orb-frag id="orb-rt-new-back"}

## The orbital way: in place {.orb-slide .orb-slide-ip}

::: {.orb-stage-wrap}
<div id="orb-stage-ip"></div>
:::

[]{.fragment .orb-frag id="orb-compile"}
[]{.fragment .orb-frag id="orb-embed"}
[]{.fragment .orb-frag id="orb-run"}
[]{.fragment .orb-frag id="orb-newdata"}
[]{.fragment .orb-frag id="orb-newpred"}
